title: Critical Thinking Tips for Close Encounters With UFO Claims
description: Given the unique importance of a potential UFO visit, confirmation requires a high standard of evidence. Here are simple tips for your inevitable close encounters with UFO claims.

title: This powerful UFO isn’t alien life, it’s a black hole unleashing a cosmic storm
description: A mysterious object speeding across the universe might look like a UFO, but the real story is even more fascinating. Scientists have discovered a supermassive black hole unleashing powerful winds at incredible speeds from a distant galaxy. These cosmic storms are strong enough to influence how galaxies grow and how stars are born. The finding offers a rare window into the universe's most active era billions of years ago.
